The Tragacanth plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic properties. taxonomy: Tragacantha robbinsii is a member of the Fabaceae family, commonly known as legumes. This family is further divided into several subfamilies, one of which is the Faboideae subfamily.
